meta.title: doctore.ar - Healthcare Technology
meta.description: Innovative technology solutions for healthcare professionals. Appointment management software, medical networks and more.

hero.description: We empower healthcare professionals with cutting-edge software. Automate, optimize, and scale your medical practice with world-class technology.

product.label: Main product
product.title: TurnosMedicos
product.description: Comprehensive appointment management system designed to maximize your practice's efficiency. Intuitive interface, smart automation, and advanced analytics.

services.title: Comprehensive services
services.subtitle: Complete technology solutions for every aspect of your professional practice

network.title: Medical Network
network.description: Connect with a network of healthcare professionals. Refer patients, share knowledge, and grow alongside colleagues in your specialty.

accounting.title: Medical Accounting
accounting.description: Specialized accounting management for healthcare professionals. Electronic invoicing, insurance settlements, and automated tax reports.

consulting.title: IT Consulting
consulting.description: Personalized technology consulting for your practice. Implementation, integrations, and continuous technical support from experts.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits the size of your practice. No hidden costs, no surprises.

about.label: About us
about.title: Innovation at the service of health
about.text_1: At doctore.ar we believe technology should simplify, not complicate. We develop solutions that allow healthcare professionals to focus on what they do best: caring for their patients.
about.text_2: Our team combines software development experience with deep knowledge of the healthcare sector, creating tools that truly solve real problems.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.description: We're ready to help you transform your medical practice. Contact us and discover how we can empower your office.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your practice and your needs...

footer.description: Innovative technology solutions for healthcare professionals.
